title: dForge Trait Definitions
description: Defines entity traits that expand into fields, references, and constraints during module install. Shipped as traits.json at module root.

includes.description: Other trait names to include (inherit fields from). Expanded recursively with circular reference protection.

fields.description: Field definitions to add to entities using this trait. Keys support {entity}/{Entity} placeholders for parametric names.

references.description: FK reference definitions to add. Keys support {Entity} placeholder.

constraints.description: Constraint definitions to add. Keys support {Entity} placeholder (e.g. 'UQ_{Entity}_period_key').

traitField.description: Field definition within a trait. Same shape as entity field definitions.

params.description: Field-type-specific configuration; same shape as entity field params (e.g. serverDefault).

serverDefault.description: Platform-computed value filled server-side on write (used by the audit / audit-full traits). Resolved by the write pipeline — not a formula.

value.description: Whitelisted server-context expression: now() → transaction clock, currentUser() → caller's user id.

on.description: Phase(s) in which the value is applied. 'save' = both insert and update.

ifEmpty.description: When true, only fill if the caller did not provide a value; when false (default), always override.

traitReference.description: FK reference definition within a trait
